title: Stablecoin-sceptic BIS exec set to become new South Korean central bank boss
snippet: South Korea’s incoming central bank chief is a crypto-sceptic who could derail industry leaders’ and lawmakers’ hopes of launching won-pegged stablecoins.

title: Fidelity urges SEC to move further on crypto activity by broker-dealers
snippet: The investment giant told the regulator's crypto task force it supports trading tokenized securities on alternative trading systems and tradfi on-chain integration.

title: In October 2025, Filecoin celebrated five years since its launch.
snippet: Filecoin (@Filecoin): In October 2025, Filecoin celebrated five years since its launch. It started with a basic principle: data should not depend on one provider. Over time, it became a network that stores large datasets across independent providers, where data can be verified instead of assumed.

title: Resolv says no assets lost as DeFi protocols respond to USR exploit
snippet: USR issuer Resolv Labs says its collateral pool remains intact after an exploit on Sunday that minted 80 million unbacked tokens and drove the US dollar stablecoin as low as $0.14.

title: Resolv Labs’ stablecoin depegs as attacker mints millions of tokens
snippet: An attacker has exploited the Resolv USR stablecoin to mint 80 million tokens and has reportedly been able to cash out at least $25 million.

title: The RWA landscape is characterized by an ongoing effort to diversify assets brought onchain.
snippet: Aptos (@Aptos): The RWA landscape is characterized by an ongoing effort to diversify assets brought onchain.
